landing.title: How to Train Your LLM
landing.subtitle: an interactive guide to building a language model from scratch

ch00.title: The Magic Trick
ch00.s01_text: You've probably used ChatGPT. You type something, it types back. Feels like magic, right?
ch00.s03_text: Impressive, right? But here's the thing — there's no magic here. Just math, data, and a clever trick called "predict the next word."
ch00.s04_text: Over the next chapters, we're going to build one of these from scratch. You'll see every piece, touch every gear.
ch00.s04_text2: By the end, you'll know exactly how it works — because you'll have built it yourself.
